About A&A

Established in 1991 by Michel AZAR Esq. AZAR and Associates is today one of the leading law firms in Lebanon. It has successfully advised and represented clients in Lebanon and abroad over three decades in a variety of cases, including corporate law, criminal law, real estate, and litigation.

Read more ›

Michel Azar

Founder and Managing Partner of AZAR and Associates Law Firm

Michel AZAR has more than 30 years of expertise invarious aspects of Lebanese and International Law. He has an in-depth knowledge of dealing with the Lebanese judicial system and Courts and has successfully conducted civil and criminal litigation matters. He also has advised and represented in several litigations of corporate and financial issues.

Mr. AZAR is a persuasive litigator. He passionately represents clients’ interests, working diligently to analyze case merits, minimizing risks and propelling positive resolutions to complex legal matters. He boasts a successful track record in achieving case dismissals, no-fault judgements, advantageous settlements and favorable verdicts.

Moreover, Michel AZAR has a wide experience in implementing corporate structures for shareholders and investors in Arab and African countries.He is skilled in preparing legal corporate documents and in providing counsel on administrative policy, employment and regulatory compliance issues.
